name: template-detail
title: Record Detail
description: Record detail page — breadcrumb + status + 2-column grid (line items + workflow timeline on the left, customer + payment cards on the right) + Drawer-based activity log.
postInstall: Swap TIMELINE / LINE_ITEMS and the customer/payment cards for your record data.
Next.js: move to src/app/orders/[id]/page.tsx and read params. Vite: route via <Route path='/orders/:id' element={<DetailPage />} />.
